source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An amusement park game, shown in Figure, launches a marble toward a small cup. The marble is placed directly on top of a spring-loaded wheel and held with a clamp. When released, the wheel spins around clockwise at constant angular acceleration, opening the clamp and releasing the marble after making 11/12 revolution. What angular acceleration is needed for the ball to land in the cup? The top of the cup is level with the center of the wheel.
